---
title: "Neelansh Visen"
site: distill::distill_website
image: "images/neel4github.jpg"
links:
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/neelvisen" 
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/neelansh/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/neelvisen"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:neelvisen@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---

## Bio
Welcome to my landing page! My name is Neelansh (Neel for short), and I'm currently working as a PM/Deployment Strategist at KPMG in Toronto. 

I graduated from the University of Toronto with a degree in economics, mathematics, and statistics in 2021. Outside of work, I love staying active (training for marathon #2!), cooking, following sports, watching movies, and playing games like Chess, the NYT Crossword, and Jeopardy!

Feel free to take a look around at some of my old projects, resume, or contact me at neelvisen@gmail.com or on [LinkedIn]( https://www.linkedin.com/in/neelansh/).

## Skills & Certifications 

**Product**: Roadmapping, PRDs, OKR/KPI definition, Agile/Scrum, A/B testing

**AI & Data**: SQL, Python, Power BI, Looker, dbt, Databricks, GCP, Prompt Engineering (Claude/ChatGPT)

**Engineering & Dev**: JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Azure DevOps, Git, REST APIs, Power Platform

**Interests**: Sports (Football, Basketball, Baseball, Hockey, Soccer), film, cooking, running, chess, Jeopardy!


## Education

**University of Toronto - St. George** | Toronto, ON

**Hons. BSc. Economics, Mathematics, Statistics** | September 2017 - June 2021

## Experience

**KPMG** | Product Manager | January 2022 - Present

**Loblaw Digital** | Product Data Analyst | September 2021 - December 2021

## Interests

**Sports**: NFL (Colts), NBA (Raptors), NHL (Capitals), MLB (Blue Jays), Premier League (Liverpool F.C.) 

**Movies**: [Letterboxd](https://letterboxd.com/neelvisen/)

**Music**: [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/user/o1todxsf5618myqhw7u806tdj)

**Chess**: [Chess.com](https://www.chess.com/member/neeshlanc)

**NYT Crossword**

**Jeopardy!**
